description_long: This is a cylindrical cup with a smooth, slightly translucent white body and a pink-tinted handle. The cup features a prominent anime-style illustration of a girl with purple hair and a red garment on one side, surrounded by small pink cherry blossom motifs. The opposite side displays another anime character, along with Japanese text and a background scene, suggesting it is themed after a specific anime or manga. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped, blending from white to a soft pink hue. The cup's rim and base are subtly highlighted in pink, adding to its decorative appeal. The surface appears glossy and hard, typical of ceramic or high-quality plastic drinkware.
description: A white, glossy cup with pink accents, featuring anime character artwork and cherry blossom motifs, and a pink-tinted handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the anime girl with purple hair, red clothing, and cherry blossom motifs.
description_view_1: Rear view focused on the pink-tinted handle, with minimal artwork visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying another anime character, Japanese text, and a background scene.
description_view_3: Side view with mostly plain white surface and a partial cherry blossom motif.
